frames.name: Accountability and Transparency Frame
frames.description: Presents the resignation as a responsible response to maintain institutional integrity, emphasizing the WEF's commitment to transparency through independent review
frames.emphasis: The organization's proper handling of the situation and Brende's decision to avoid 'distractions'

frames.name: Elite Network Scrutiny Frame
frames.description: Focuses on broader pattern of high-profile resignations and ongoing scrutiny of powerful figures with Epstein connections
frames.emphasis: Part of wider fallout affecting business leaders, academics, and politicians globally

frames.name: Conservative Skepticism Frame
frames.description: Frames the story with subtle skepticism toward the 'globalist body' and emphasizes Trump's recent interaction with Brende at Davos
frames.emphasis: The WEF as a 'globalist body' and includes prominent photo of Trump with Brende

frames.name: Procedural Compliance Frame
frames.description: Emphasizes the formal review process, findings, and organizational succession planning
frames.emphasis: The independent review's conclusions and interim leadership arrangements

outlierPerspectives: Fox News uniquely describes the WEF as a 'globalist body' and prominently features Trump's recent interaction with Brende
The Guardian uniquely contextualizes this within a broader pattern of elite resignations, mentioning Larry Summers and Thomas Pritzker
BBC uniquely mentions the criminal charges against former Norwegian PM Thorbjørn Jagland in connection with Epstein
missingContext: Timeline clarity: Most sources don't clearly explain when Brende initially denied contact versus when he admitted it
Nature of the business relationships: Limited detail about what business contexts brought these figures together with Epstein
WEF's broader governance: Little context about the organization's structure and how this affects its operations
Epstein document release scope: Limited explanation of what the recent DOJ document release contained beyond Brende's communications
